title: Workshops
text:

title: Projects
text:
Biological Data Modeling

Spatio-temporal and GIS-based modeling of dengue risk, including vulnerability mapping (Withanage et al., 2021), incidence forecasting, viral strain tracking, and vector control trials in Gampaha District, Sri Lanka.
Spatial and seasonal analysis of human leptospirosis in Gampaha District (Denipitiya et al., 2016).
Radiation dose evaluation and operator variability in fluoroscopy-guided procedures (Gunawardena et al., 2025).
Descriptive epidemiology of COVID-19 in children under 14 in Sri Lanka (Cabraal et al., 2021).
Predictive modeling for prehospital endotracheal intubation success (Diggs, Viswakula, Sheth-Chanda & Leo, 2015).

title: Projects
text:
Count Data Modeling

An EM algorithmic approach for modeling inflated count data, released as R code under US Copyright and now available as the kinfl R package for Kth-Inflated Poisson Regression (Fernando, De Mel & Viswakula, 2026) — see Software.
Diagnostic methods for matched case-control studies via a SAS macro for Proc Logistic (Viswakula & Sooriyaarachchi, 2011).

title: Projects
text:
Genomics Data Modeling

Benchmarking transcription factor binding site prediction tools across human and Arabidopsis genomes (Wanniarachchi, Viswakula & Wickramasuriya, 2024).
TP53 nucleotide variants and their correlation with p53 pathway protein expression in Sri Lankan breast and colorectal cancer patients (Manoharan et al., 2020).
Validation of a FISH assay for detecting chromosomal aneuploidies (13, 18, 21, X, Y) in prenatal diagnosis (Pahala Ralalage et al., 2023).
RNA secondary structure prediction for long sequences using inversion excursions (Yehdego et al., 2012), building on the RNASSA and Segmenta tools (see Software).
A statistical framework for peak-calling in ChIP-seq data (in progress).

title: Projects
text:
R Programming

Interactive R Shiny applications for citation management, geographic mapping of Sri Lanka, and image-to-plot conversion — see the full list under Software.
Hands-on R training delivered through workshops for researchers, postgraduates, and public-sector scientists — see Workshops.

title: Sameera Viswakula
text:
LinkedIn
  
  
     GitHub
  
  
     Email
  

  
  


I am a Senior Lecturer at the Department of Statistics, University of Colombo, Sri Lanka, where I work on computational statistics, genomic biostatistics, and machine learning. I enjoy building statistical models and R tools that turn messy data into useful, reproducible answers — and sharing that work through research, teaching, and consultancy.




Computational Statistics
Genomic Biostatistics
Biological Data Modeling
Machine Learning
Big Data Analytics
R Programming





PhD in Genomic Biostatistics, Old Dominion University, VA, USA
MS in Statistics, University of Texas at El Paso, TX, USA
BSc in Statistics (First Class Honours), University of Colombo, Sri Lanka

title: Sameera Viswakula
text:
Experience
I have more than 15 years of experience in research, consultancy and teaching. I like to model data and communicate to public in efficient ways.

title: Sameera Viswakula
text:
Honors and Awards

President’s Award for Scientific Research - 2018 (Awarded in April, 2021).
National Research Council Merit Award for Scientific Research - 2020 (Awarded in May, 2025).
University of Colombo Senate Award for Research Excellence - Certificate of Commendation - For years 2020, 2021, and 2025.
Faculty Award for Research Excellence, Faculty of Science, University of Colombo - For years 2020, 2021, 2023, and 2024.
Faculty Award for Academic Outreach and Institution Development, Faculty of Science, University of Colombo - For years 2019 to 2024.
Graduate Statistician - Royal Statistical Society, 2014.
Department of Statistics Gold Medal for the Final Year Statistics Project, 2008 University of Colombo, Sri Lanka.

title: Sameera Viswakula
text:
Research Publications

Gunawardena H, Nissanka M, Satharasinghe DM, Viswakula S, Varatharajan M, Abeyweera A, Ganewatte E, Pathmathas T, Jayakody M, Padovani R, Jeyasugiththan J. Evaluation of radiation doses and the impact of operator variability on radiation exposure in fluoroscopy-guided procedures: insights from Sri Lanka. Journal of Radiological Protection, 45(3), 2025.

Validation of Fluorescence in Situ Hybridization (FISH) Assay Using an Analyte-Specific Reagent in Detecting Aneuploidies of Chromosomes 13, 18, 21, X, and Y in Prenatal Diagnosis. OBM Genetics, 7(1), 177, 2023.
Cabraal MNS, Samarawickrama RIU, Kodithuwakku KARR, Viswakula SD, Lantra SR. Nationwide descriptive study of COVID-19 in children below the age of 14 years in Sri Lanka. Sri Lanka Journal of Child Health, 50(1), 2021.
Withanage, G.P., Gunawardana, M., Viswakula, S.D., Samaraweera, K., Gunawardena, N.S. & Hapugoda, M.D. Multivariate spatio-temporal approach to identify vulnerable localities in dengue risk areas using Geographic Information System (GIS). Scientific Reports, 11, 4080, 2021.
Withanage, G.P., Viswakula, S.D., Gunawardene, Y.S. & Hapugoda, M.D. Use of Novaluron-Based Autocidal Gravid Ovitraps to Control Aedes Dengue Vector Mosquitoes in the District of Gampaha, Sri Lanka. BioMed Research International, 2020.
Manoharan, V., Karunanayake, E.H., Tennekoon, K.H., De Silva, S., Imthikab, A.I.A., De Silva, K., Angunawela, P., Viswakula, S. & Lunec, J. Pattern of nucleotide variants of TP53 and their correlation with the expression of p53 and its downstream proteins in a Sri Lankan cohort of breast and colorectal cancer patients. BMC Cancer, 20, 72, 2020.
Withanage, G.P., Hapuarachchi, H.C., Viswakula, S., Gunawardena, Y.I.N.S. & Hapugoda, M. Entomological surveillance with viral tracking demonstrates a migrated viral strain caused dengue epidemic in July, 2017 in Sri Lanka. PLoS ONE, 15(5), 2020.
Wijesinghe, I.H. & Viswakula, S.D. Machine Learning for Pre-Auction Sample Selection. National Information Technology Conference (NITC), Colombo, 2018.
Withanage, G.P., Viswakula, S.D., Gunawardena, Y.I.N.S. & Hapugoda, M.D. A forecasting model for dengue incidence in the District of Gampaha, Sri Lanka. Parasites & Vectors, 2018.
Bruhn, A., Newcomb, T. & Viswakula, S. Feedback Delay as an Approach to Teaching Oral Radiographic Technique. Radiology Science and Education, AEIRS, 2017.
Denipitiya, T.H., Chandrasekharan, V., Abeyewickreme, W., Viswakula, S. & Hapugoda, M. Spatial and seasonal analysis of human leptospirosis in the District of Gampaha, Sri Lanka. Sri Lankan Journal of Infectious Diseases, 2016.
Diggs, L.A., Viswakula, S.D., Sheth-Chanda, M. & Leo, G.D. A Pilot Model for Predicting the Success of Prehospital Endotracheal Intubation. The American Journal of Emergency Medicine, 33(2), 202-208, 2015.
Yehdego, D.T., Kodimala, V.K., Viswakula, S., Zhang, B., Vegesna, R., Johnson, K.L., Taufer, M. & Leung, M.-Y. Secondary structure predictions for long RNA sequences based on inversion excursions: preliminary results. Proceedings of the ACM Conference on Bioinformatics, Computational Biology and Biomedicine, 545-547, 2012.
Viswakula, S. & Sooriyaarachchi, M.R. Diagnostics for matched case control studies: SAS macro for Proc Logistic. Journal of the National Science Foundation of Sri Lanka, 39, 13-23, 2011.

For the complete and continuously updated list, visit Google Scholar.

title: Software
text:
kinfl: Kth-Inflated Poisson Regression. Fernando, G., De Mel, W. & Viswakula, S. (2026). R package version 0.1.0. https://github.com/sameeranc/kinfl
# install from GitHub
install.packages("remotes")
remotes::install_github("sameeranc/kinfl")

title: Software
text:
United States Copyright
• R code for modeling inflated count data: an EM algorithmic approach. Copyright Number: TXu002192850 (2020) Viswakula, Sameera Dhananjaya and Fernando, Srinal.

title: Software
text:
R Shiny Apps

An R Shiny web application that integrates the Semantic Scholar API to analyze and download citation details of Google Scholar publications, providing researchers with an efficient and user-friendly tool for citation management. https://sameera-viswakula.shinyapps.io/Google_Citation_Downloader_App/
An interactive R Shiny application for creating customizable maps of Sri Lanka. Users can select specific provinces, districts, or DS divisions and export high-quality maps in PNG, PDF, or dynamic HTML formats. https://sameera-viswakula.shinyapps.io/SL_Map_App/
Shiny app for converting an image to an R plot. It can also be used to draw and creat a 2D dataset with a trends, outliers etc. Check it out here. https://sameera-viswakula.shinyapps.io/Convert_or_draw_your_plot/
